metadata.notes: All characters are pre-Samurai civilian pregens. Starting proficiencies and 2 starting Skill Points have been assigned for ready-to-play use.

pregens.name: Marcus Vale
pregens.concept: Patient tracker and street-level contract hunter.
pregens.summary: You track, trap, and terminate: whether for a payday or just the thrill.
pregens.ability_text: Once per day, declare a target. You gain +2 to all rolls that involve tracking, hunting, or hitting that one target in combat. The target does not need to be known to you; it can just be something you are hunting.
pregens.home: A crumbling safehouse in an abandoned police precinct, reinforced doors but no running water.
equipment: Cigarette case filled with encrypted data chips
pregens.debt: Owe a bounty to the wrong people.
pregens.customization_note: Ready to play. Rename freely before play. This character is not yet Samurai unless the GM starts after the upgrade event. You may swap proficiencies among Background skills and may move the two starting Skill Points before play.

roll20_attributes.background_ability: The Hunt Never Ends — Once per day, declare a target. You gain +2 to all rolls that involve tracking, hunting, or hitting that one target in combat. The target does not need to be known to you; it can just be something you are hunting.

pregens.name: Lena Cross
pregens.concept: Quiet thief who lives three exits ahead of the alarm.
pregens.summary: The only thing you want is other people's stuff.
pregens.ability_text: Once per day, as long as you are in or near a crowd, you can instantly lose any pursuit. Gain +2 to Stealth for the purposes of breaking and entering.
pregens.home: Someone else's apartment. You are not supposed to be staying there, and yet you still are.
clothes: Skintight catsuit underneath perfectly ordinary clothes
equipment: Climbing claws for scaling mega buildings
pregens.customization_note: Ready to play. Rename freely before play. This character is not yet Samurai unless the GM starts after the upgrade event. You may swap proficiencies among Background skills and may move the two starting Skill Points before play.

roll20_attributes.background_ability: Just Someone in the Crowd — Once per day, as long as you are in or near a crowd, you can instantly lose any pursuit. Gain +2 to Stealth for the purposes of breaking and entering.

pregens.name: Adrian Holt
pregens.concept: Disgraced security professional with old protocols and new enemies.
pregens.summary: You used to enforce the law. Now, you are above it.
pregens.ability_text: Once per day, flash your old credentials and force someone to hesitate or comply, even if you have not been a cop in years. Gain +2 when trying to Bully any Civilian-type NPCs.
pregens.home: A safehouse in an old subway station; the last good cop still checks in on you.
weapons: Broken stun baton that still works sometimes
pregens.customization_note: Ready to play. Rename freely before play. This character is not yet Samurai unless the GM starts after the upgrade event. You may swap proficiencies among Background skills and may move the two starting Skill Points before play.

roll20_attributes.background_ability: Badge Intimidation — Once per day, flash your old credentials and force someone to hesitate or comply, even if you have not been a cop in years. Gain +2 when trying to Bully any Civilian-type NPCs.

pregens.name: Nika Voss
pregens.concept: Mesh addict and cortex-scorched systems savant.
pregens.summary: You live more in the mesh than the real world.
pregens.ability_text: Once per day, you can either push your neural processor to triple speed, allowing you to use Hacking twice in a single action, or reroll a failed Hacking attempt.
pregens.home: A VR cafe jury-rigged into a living space; half the customers think you are a digital ghost.
clothes: LED-coated jacket that cycles through old hacker slogans
weapons: Smart pistol with a safety override
pregens.debt: 3,000 in debt to a hacker collective; they expect results.
pregens.customization_note: Ready to play. Rename freely before play. This character is not yet Samurai unless the GM starts after the upgrade event. You may swap proficiencies among Background skills and may move the two starting Skill Points before play.

roll20_attributes.background_ability: Overclocked Brain — Once per day, you can either push your neural processor to triple speed, allowing you to use Hacking twice in a single action, or reroll a failed Hacking attempt.

pregens.name: Salim Reyes
pregens.concept: Wasteland courier who treats speed as armour.
pregens.summary: Speed is survival. You never stay in one place for long.
pregens.ability_text: Once per day, move twice as far in one Movement action, ignoring terrain penalties.
pregens.home: A converted cargo truck filled with old navigation maps and half-eaten protein bars.
pregens.customization_note: Ready to play. Rename freely before play. This character is not yet Samurai unless the GM starts after the upgrade event. You may swap proficiencies among Background skills and may move the two starting Skill Points before play.

roll20_attributes.background_ability: Blink and You Miss Me — Once per day, move twice as far in one Movement action, ignoring terrain penalties.

pregens.name: Dana Kaur
pregens.concept: Veteran deserter with battlefield instincts and old ghosts.
pregens.summary: You have seen war. You do not want to see it again.
pregens.ability_text: You never freeze in combat. If you are ambushed, you still get a turn before anything hits you.
pregens.home: A bunk in a shared mercenary dormitory, surrounded by other people running from something.
clothes: Dated armoured jacket stiff from dried blood
weapons: Knife with someone’s name scratched into the blade
pregens.debt: No debt, but someone high up wants you erased.
pregens.customization_note: Ready to play. Rename freely before play. This character is not yet Samurai unless the GM starts after the upgrade event. You may swap proficiencies among Background skills and may move the two starting Skill Points before play.

roll20_attributes.background_ability: War Never Changes — You never freeze in combat. If you are ambushed, you still get a turn before anything hits you.

pregens.name: Milo Rask
pregens.concept: Charming runaway whose luck has a body count.
pregens.summary: You bet it all; now you gamble that you can outrun your problems.
pregens.ability_text: Once per day, if you roll a 20 on a D20, replace the result with a 2. Once per day, if you have sacrificed a 20 result, you may replace any other result with a Critical Success.
pregens.home: A roach-infested motel room on the outskirts, paid in cash under a fake name.
clothes: Long jacket with gang patches hastily removed
equipment: Lucky coin stolen from the wrong person
pregens.customization_note: Ready to play. Rename freely before play. This character is not yet Samurai unless the GM starts after the upgrade event. You may swap proficiencies among Background skills and may move the two starting Skill Points before play.

roll20_attributes.background_ability: Lady Luck — Once per day, if you roll a 20 on a D20, replace the result with a 2. Once per day, if you have sacrificed a 20 result, you may replace any other result with a Critical Success.

pregens.name: Rosa Tan
pregens.concept: Machine whisperer with a toolbox full of stolen miracles.
pregens.summary: You build machines. You fix machines. Sometimes, you punch machines.
pregens.ability_text: As long as you are repairing something that belongs to you or an ally, you gain +2 to Jury-Rigging and Engineering.
pregens.home: A corner of an old auto-shop, protected by booby-trapped junk piles.
equipment: Toolbox full of borrowed corporate tech
Love letter from someone you ghosted
pregens.customization_note: Ready to play. Rename freely before play. This character is not yet Samurai unless the GM starts after the upgrade event. You may swap proficiencies among Background skills and may move the two starting Skill Points before play.

roll20_attributes.background_ability: Built Like a Tank — As long as you are repairing something that belongs to you or an ally, you gain +2 to Jury-Rigging and Engineering.

pregens.name: Jax Morrow
pregens.concept: Undercity survivor who knows where the city forgets to look.
pregens.summary: You were not raised—you survived.
pregens.ability_text: Once per day, you can find a secret, unmonitored path through the city: alleyways, sewer tunnels, maintenance shafts. Even in total lockdown, you always have an escape.
pregens.home: A squat in an abandoned parking garage, surrounded by old shopping carts and makeshift tarps.
clothes: Ratty hoodie with corporate logos from five years ago
equipment: Metro card with enough credits for one last ride
pregens.customization_note: Ready to play. Rename freely before play. This character is not yet Samurai unless the GM starts after the upgrade event. You may swap proficiencies among Background skills and may move the two starting Skill Points before play.

roll20_attributes.background_ability: Rat Runs the Maze — Once per day, you can find a secret, unmonitored path through the city: alleyways, sewer tunnels, maintenance shafts. Even in total lockdown, you always have an escape.

pregens.name: Ilya Novak
pregens.concept: Signal terrorist and AR illusionist with drone-feed instincts.
pregens.summary: You do not just hack computers; you hack people’s senses.
pregens.ability_name: See What I Want You to See
pregens.ability_text: Once per day, you can use the GhostWalk hack without having to roll for success.
pregens.home: An old movie theater rigged as a personal VR den, filled with AI-crafted dreams.
pregens.debt: Blacklisted from every mainstream mesh network.
pregens.customization_note: Ready to play. Rename freely before play. This character is not yet Samurai unless the GM starts after the upgrade event. You may swap proficiencies among Background skills and may move the two starting Skill Points before play.

roll20_attributes.background_ability: See What I Want You to See — Once per day, you can use the GhostWalk hack without having to roll for success.

pregens.name: Talia Cruz
pregens.concept: Corporate-trained pilot who cannot stop answering the signal.
pregens.summary: Speed is king. Surviving it is queen.
pregens.ability_text: Once per Day, you can double the Movement speed of a Vehicle or Mech for one Round.
pregens.home: A tiny apartment in the Mega Building the corp you work for owns.
pregens.debt: Licence renewal due in a week; flat 15,000Cr fee.
pregens.customization_note: Ready to play. Rename freely before play. This character is not yet Samurai unless the GM starts after the upgrade event. You may swap proficiencies among Background skills and may move the two starting Skill Points before play.

roll20_attributes.background_ability: Get There Fast — Once per Day, you can double the Movement speed of a Vehicle or Mech for one Round.

pregens.name: Emi Laurent
pregens.concept: Broke street artist who sees the city as unfinished canvas.
pregens.summary: Maybe one day people will recognize you? Probably not.
pregens.ability_text: Once per Day, gain a sudden burst of inspiration, allowing you to gain Advantage (1D4 + your Performance) on a single Non-Combat roll.
pregens.home: A run-down cubicle apartment in a rent-a-day centre; they forgot to charge you last week.
clothes: Loose sweater covered in paint stains
pregens.debt: About 40,000 in Art School loans with 22% compounding interest.
pregens.customization_note: Ready to play. Rename freely before play. This character is not yet Samurai unless the GM starts after the upgrade event. You may swap proficiencies among Background skills and may move the two starting Skill Points before play.

roll20_attributes.background_ability: The Muse Smiles — Once per Day, gain a sudden burst of inspiration, allowing you to gain Advantage (1D4 + your Performance) on a single Non-Combat roll.

pregens.name: Jonah Mirek
pregens.concept: True believer whose faith keeps moving when sense says stop.
pregens.summary: You believe in something bigger than yourself.
pregens.ability_text: Once per Combat, your faith keeps you going. Heal 1D4 HP as a Free Action.
pregens.home: A hidden underground chapel full of chanting believers.
equipment: Flask of sacred oil, probably combat drugs
pregens.customization_note: Ready to play. Rename freely before play. This character is not yet Samurai unless the GM starts after the upgrade event. You may swap proficiencies among Background skills and may move the two starting Skill Points before play.

roll20_attributes.background_ability: Faith Drives Me — Once per Combat, your faith keeps you going. Heal 1D4 HP as a Free Action.

pregens.name: Dr. Mira Sayegh
pregens.concept: Black-clinic surgeon who can patch almost anything except trust.
pregens.summary: You fix people. Sometimes. You try, at least.
pregens.ability_text: Once per Combat as a Bonus Action, you can patch up yourself or an Ally. Roll a DC: 10 First Aid check; on a success, you or your ally heals for 1D6.
pregens.home: An abandoned ambulance, still stocked with supplies. The siren still works.
weapons: Syringe gun filled with mystery anesthetic
pregens.customization_note: Ready to play. Rename freely before play. This character is not yet Samurai unless the GM starts after the upgrade event. You may swap proficiencies among Background skills and may move the two starting Skill Points before play.

roll20_attributes.background_ability: Meat is Weak — Once per Combat as a Bonus Action, you can patch up yourself or an Ally. Roll a DC: 10 First Aid check; on a success, you or your ally heals for 1D6.

pregens.name: Kenji Park
pregens.concept: Obsessive Samurai fan with merch, footwork, and no field time.
pregens.summary: Your Oshi is the best! You are going to be just like them.
pregens.ability_name: Say hello to my little (fake) friend!
pregens.ability_text: You have a collection of high-end, hyper-realistic recreations of popular Samurai gear. All of it is non-functional. Once per day, you can produce a fake version of a Tier-three piece of equipment.
pregens.home: The basement at your mother’s place.
clothes: Jacket with your favourite Samurai on the back
equipment: Body pillow of your favourite Samurai
pregens.customization_note: Ready to play. Rename freely before play. This character is not yet Samurai unless the GM starts after the upgrade event. You may swap proficiencies among Background skills and may move the two starting Skill Points before play.

roll20_attributes.background_ability: Say hello to my little (fake) friend! — You have a collection of high-end, hyper-realistic recreations of popular Samurai gear. All of it is non-functional. Once per day, you can produce a fake version of a Tier-three piece of equipment.

pregens.name: Petra Vance
pregens.concept: Ruins-picker who survives by finding value in wreckage.
pregens.summary: Someone has to look for gold.
pregens.ability_text: Once per day you can happen upon a useful little gizmo, weapon, or piece of equipment worth below 300Cr from the Civilian Gear tables.
pregens.home: A van filled to the brim with junk you have not found anyone to buy.
pregens.customization_note: Ready to play. Rename freely before play. This character is not yet Samurai unless the GM starts after the upgrade event. You may swap proficiencies among Background skills and may move the two starting Skill Points before play.

roll20_attributes.background_ability: Oh, What’s This? — Once per day you can happen upon a useful little gizmo, weapon, or piece of equipment worth below 300Cr from the Civilian Gear tables.

pregens.name: Noor Bellamy
pregens.concept: Corporate academy escapee with debts, passkeys, and questions.
pregens.summary: They said you had a bright future. Then you found out what the company was really doing.
pregens.ability_text: Once per day, recall something you have studied, gaining +2 to any non-combat skill for a single roll.
pregens.home: A clean corporate apartment still listed under an old identity; repo team is coming.
clothes: School polo you forgot to return
pregens.debt: 100,000 in corporate debt; they want it back.
pregens.customization_note: Ready to play. Rename freely before play. This character is not yet Samurai unless the GM starts after the upgrade event. You may swap proficiencies among Background skills and may move the two starting Skill Points before play.

roll20_attributes.background_ability: I Studied For This! — Once per day, recall something you have studied, gaining +2 to any non-combat skill for a single roll.

pregens.name: Elise Ward
pregens.concept: Escaped experiment held together by faulty cyberware and stubbornness.
pregens.summary: Your body is not yours: it was an experiment.
pregens.ability_text: Once per Combat, as a Free Action, activate Latent Experimental Cyberware. Roll a D4 for a one-turn effect: super speed, pain resistance, enhanced reflexes, or better vision. Afterward, lose 1D4 HP.
pregens.home: An underground shelter full of other lost souls, each one stranger than the last.
pregens.customization_note: Ready to play. Rename freely before play. This character is not yet Samurai unless the GM starts after the upgrade event. You may swap proficiencies among Background skills and may move the two starting Skill Points before play.

roll20_attributes.background_ability: Glitch Mode — Once per Combat, as a Free Action, activate Latent Experimental Cyberware. Roll a D4 for a one-turn effect: super speed, pain resistance, enhanced reflexes, or better vision. Afterward, lose 1D4 HP.

pregens.name: Tomasz Iversen
pregens.concept: Pit-fighter who knows the sound a room makes before violence.
pregens.summary: You survived the fight pits.
pregens.ability_text: Once per day, as a Free Action, you can attempt to Stun an enemy after making a successful Melee hit. The enemy rolls against DC 10 Save to avoid being Stunned for one turn.
pregens.home: A broken locker in the basement of a fight club, barely enough space to stretch out.
pregens.debt: On the hit list of an underground fight promoter.
pregens.customization_note: Ready to play. Rename freely before play. This character is not yet Samurai unless the GM starts after the upgrade event. You may swap proficiencies among Background skills and may move the two starting Skill Points before play.

roll20_attributes.background_ability: Knockout Blow — Once per day, as a Free Action, you can attempt to Stun an enemy after making a successful Melee hit. The enemy rolls against DC 10 Save to avoid being Stunned for one turn.

pregens.name: Cass Vega
pregens.concept: Former riot-maker with one song left and too many grudges.
pregens.summary: You had a hit song once; now your royalty checks have dried up.
pregens.ability_text: Once per day, as a Bonus Action, draw all attention, including enemy aggression, to yourself for one Round. All opponents in a combat scene within 30 Feet must roll a DC: 10 plus your Performance Save. On failure, they must include you in their next Attack Action.
pregens.home: A storage unit packed with old merch, a single mattress on the floor.
clothes: Aged leather jacket covered in tour patches
equipment: Broken holo-projector of your greatest performance
Signed poster of a rival you hate
Guitar case with a secret compartment
pregens.debt: Owe a music label a whole album.
pregens.customization_note: Ready to play. Rename freely before play. This character is not yet Samurai unless the GM starts after the upgrade event. You may swap proficiencies among Background skills and may move the two starting Skill Points before play.

roll20_attributes.background_ability: One Last Encore — Once per day, as a Bonus Action, draw all attention, including enemy aggression, to yourself for one Round. All opponents in a combat scene within 30 Feet must roll a DC: 10 plus your Performance Save. On failure, they must include you in their next Attack Action.
